scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "pnpm dev:electron:web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:31420 && pnpm electron:compile && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:31420 electron electron/dist/main.js"
scripts.electron:build: cross-env VITE_ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm build && pnpm electron:compile && pnpm electron:stage-app && electron-builder --projectDir electron/app
scripts.electron:build:darwin-arm64: cross-env VITE_ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm build && pnpm electron:compile && cross-env MEDIAGO_ELECTRON_TARGET_PLATFORM=darwin-arm64 pnpm electron:stage-app && electron-builder --projectDir electron/app --mac zip --arm64
scripts.electron:build:windows-x64: cross-env VITE_ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm build && pnpm electron:compile && cross-env MEDIAGO_ELECTRON_TARGET_PLATFORM=windows-x64 pnpm electron:stage-app && electron-builder --projectDir electron/app --win --x64
scripts.electron:publish: cross-env VITE_ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm build && pnpm electron:compile && pnpm electron:stage-app && electron-builder --projectDir electron/app --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:darwin-arm64: cross-env VITE_ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm build && pnpm electron:compile && cross-env MEDIAGO_ELECTRON_TARGET_PLATFORM=darwin-arm64 pnpm electron:stage-app && electron-builder --projectDir electron/app --mac zip --arm64 --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:windows-x64: cross-env VITE_ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm build && pnpm electron:compile && cross-env MEDIAGO_ELECTRON_TARGET_PLATFORM=windows-x64 pnpm electron:stage-app && electron-builder --projectDir electron/app --win --x64 --publish always
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format
scripts.check:fix: pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm run format:fix
